title: Buyer Rescue Workflow
short: Turn a buyer support breakdown into a proof-backed workflow upgrade.
problem: A buyer cannot access a download or paid resource. A one-off AI reply might be helpful, but the institution needs a reusable workflow that prevents repeat confusion, handles escalation, and leaves evidence.
mission: Convert the support incident into a GoalOS proof mission: classify the issue, draft a clear response, score the response, improve the workflow, record a public-safe Proof Card, and preserve private buyer data off-chain.
why: This is the simplest credible proof: everyone understands support. It demonstrates that GoalOS is not just answering; it is improving an operational workflow.
